title: Port of LA/Long Beach strike — 30 days
historical_analogue: 2002 West Coast port lockout (10 days, $1B/day loss), 2014-15 congestion
description: ILWU dockworkers strike at the Ports of Los Angeles and Long Beach, handling 40% of US imports. Container ships anchor offshore. Retailers face inventory shortfalls. Automotive assembly lines halt awaiting parts.
